entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop being studied for drought and heat tolerance

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A condition of water scarcity affecting crop growth

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand drought conditions

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: A condition of high temperature that negatively impacts plant processes

entities.name: PHENOTYPING PROTOCOLS
entities.description: Standardized procedures used to measure physical traits of plants

entities.name: FLOWERING STAGE
entities.description: The critical growth phase of the plant where reproduction occurs

entities.name: SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating germplasm to identify specific traits

entities.name: MAPPING-POPULATIONS
entities.description: Groups of plants used to map genetic markers to traits

entities.name: QTL
entities.description: Quantitative trait loci associated with specific traits

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Specific genes suspected to be responsible for a trait

entities.name: DRY SEASON
entities.description: A period of the year characterized by low rainfall and often high temperatures

entities.name: POLLINATION
entities.description: The process of transferring pollen for fertilization

entities.name: WATER DEFICIT
entities.description: A state where the plant lacks sufficient water

entities.name: ANTHESIS
entities.description: The period during which a flower is fully open and functional

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Research conducted in natural agricultural settings

entities.name: CONTROLLED ENVIRONMENT EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Research conducted in regulated settings like greenhouses
